title: Recalculated McMillan Limit
description: Corrected calculation of the McMillan limit yields ~72K for conventional mechanisms and ~295K for optimistic scenarios, significantly higher than the traditional ~40K estimate.

title: Allen-Dynes Formula Systematic Error
description: Discovered systematic -97% underestimation error in the asymptotic behavior of the Allen-Dynes formula for strong-coupling superconductors.

title: Zeta Spectrum of BCS Theory Submitted to PRB
description: Finalized version 5.8 of the Zeta Spectrum paper demonstrating universal ratios as digamma/ζ truncations. Submitted to Physical Review B for peer review.

title: Arithmetic-Geometric Pairing Correspondence
description: Established correspondence between number fields, lattice structures, and pairing symmetries via Bost-Connes algebra, providing a unified framework for understanding superconducting pairing mechanisms.

title: Polygamma Identity for ζ Functions
description: Proved exact identity: ψ⁽ⁿ⁾(1/2) = (-1)^(n+1) n!(2^(n+1)-1)ζ(n+1), connecting polygamma functions to Riemann zeta values.

title: BCS Universal Ratios as Digamma/ζ Truncations
description: Proved that all BCS universal ratios are successive truncations of a single digamma/ζ Taylor series expansion, revealing deep mathematical unity in superconductivity theory.

title: Quantum Metric as Universal Superconductor Diagnostic
description: Validated quantum metric as a universal diagnostic tool across all major superconductor families, analyzing 50 different materials from cuprates to iron-based to heavy fermion systems.

title: MATBG Superfluid Weight Decomposition
description: Completed band-basis decomposition of superfluid weight in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene. Submitted to Physical Review B.

title: Planckian Duality Number Proposed
description: Introduced the Planckian Duality Number as a new classification metric for superconductors, connecting Planckian dissipation to superconducting coherence.
